name: robo-coop-tools
description: Robo Co-op official marketplace — the team-curated Claude Code plugins in three editions: Lite (beginners), Standard (full workflow), Pro (Loop Engineering add-on).

plugins.name: robobuilder
plugins.description: Robo Builder Standard — 41 skills, 9 phase-specific agents, 3 playbooks, harness config, bidirectional Notion learning loop.

plugins.name: robobuilder-lite
plugins.description: Robo Builder Lite — 4 merged mega-skills (plan / build / improve / ship) for beginners, with the same hooks and review agents as Standard.

plugins.name: robobuilder-pro
plugins.description: Robo Builder Pro — Loop Engineering add-on (install alongside Standard): design, gate, audit, and compound autonomous agent loops on top of native /goal, /loop, /batch, and Routines.
